items.claim: Austin Bashi's performance in his first two UFC fights does not suggest he can handle a dangerous opponent like Delgado.
items.quote: the two fights I've seen of him in the UFC, I don't think it gives me much hope against a guy as dangerous as Delgado.

items.claim: Jose Delgado will finish Austin Bashi via TKO in the first round.
items.quote: I think Delgado clips him in the first.

items.claim: Tabitha Richie is a top-five gatekeeper who will not fight for a title.
items.quote: she's essentially just a top five gatekeeper never going to fight for the belt

items.claim: Fatima Kline has a strong Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu background.
items.quote: she's also got a big BJJ background and very good grappler

items.claim: Tabitha Richie lacks consistency in her performances.
items.quote: Tabitha Richic just ain't consistent enough.

items.claim: Fatima Kline has a superior grappling background compared to Tabitha Richie.
items.quote: She's got the bigger grappling background.

items.claim: Fatima Kline's striking is a potential weakness.
items.quote: I do worry about the stand up of Fatima Mlan
